title: Up From the Grave He Arose

verses.text: Low in the grave he lay-- Jesus, my Savior, waiting the coming day-- Jesus, my Lord. Up from the grave he arose, with a mighty triumph o'er his foes. He arose a victor from the dark domain, and he lives forever with his saints to reign. He arose! He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!

Vainly they watch his bed-- Jesus, my Savior; vainly they seal the dead-- Jesus, my Lord. Up from the grave he arose, with a mighty triumph o'er his foes. He arose a victor from the dark domain, and he lives forever with his saints to reign. He arose! He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!

Death cannot keep his prey-- Jesus, my Savior; he tore the bars away-- Jesus, my Lord. Up from the grave he arose, with a mighty triumph o'er his foes. He arose a victor from the dark domain, and he lives forever with his saints to reign. He arose! He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!
